ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123-4567890-1234567 Confirmation
ham.body:
Hello John Doe,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order has been successfully placed and is now being processed.

Order Details:
 • Order ID: 123-4567890-1234567
 • Items:
   – Wireless Bluetooth Headphones – Qty: 1 – $79.99
   – USB-C Charger – Qty: 2 – $19.99
 • Total: $119.97

Shipping Information:
 • Address: 123 Maple Street, Apt 4B, Springfield, IL 62704
 • Shipping Method: Standard Shipping (5–7 business days)

Estimated Delivery: 12 Oct 2026

If you have any questions or need to update your shipping address, please visit <URL> or call our customer support at 1‑800‑AMA‑ZON.

Thank you for choosing Amazon. We appreciate your business!

Best regards,
Amazon.com Team

spam.subject: URGENT: FedEx Delivery Fee Pending – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Attention: Your FedEx shipment (Tracking # 9876543210) has been delayed due to a missed delivery fee.

To avoid further delay and possible return of your package, you must pay the missed delivery fee of $34.92 within the next 48 hours.

Please complete the payment immediately by visiting <URL> or calling our secure payment line at 1‑800‑FED‑EXP.

Failure to act will result in additional fees and your package may be returned to sender. This is a mandatory requirement as per FedEx policy.

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

Thank you,
FedEx Customer Support
